name: Petstages Monkey Stuffing-Free Squeaky Dog Plush Toy
description: Most dogs must spend some time alone, without their owners. Because boredom can lead to destructive behavior, it is essential that you provide your dog with appropriate toys that fight monotony and offer enticing play. To do this, Petstages has developed a line of playing toys that incorporate various sounds, textures, shapes, materials and movements.
